registration_schema.description: OctoManger email API connection settings used by the REGISTER action

email_api_url.title: OctoManger API URL
email_api_url.description: Base URL of the OctoManger backend, e.g. http://localhost:8080

email_api_key.title: OctoManger API Key
email_api_key.description: X-Api-Key value for authenticating with OctoManger

proxy.title: HTTP Proxy
proxy.description: Optional HTTP/HTTPS proxy URL for GitHub requests

actions.description: Auto-register a new GitHub account. Arkose Labs (OctoCaptcha) is solved automatically via 2captcha.

email.description: Registration email (must match the OctoManger email account)

email_account_id.description: OctoManger email account ID to poll for the verification code

twocaptcha_api_key.description: 2captcha API key for solving Arkose Labs FunCaptcha (OctoCaptcha)

wait_seconds.description: Max seconds to wait for verification email (10–600, default: 120)

poll_interval.description: Email poll interval in seconds (3–30, default: 8)

proxy.description: HTTP/HTTPS proxy URL for GitHub requests

arkose_public_key.description: Override Arkose Labs public key UUID (auto-extracted from page by default)

arkose_subdomain.description: Override Arkose Labs API JS subdomain (default: github-api.arkoselabs.com)
